references.text: Chase, MW, JL Reveal & MF Fay. 2009. A subfamilial classification for the expanded asparagalean families Amaryllidaceae, Asparagaceae and Xanthorrhoeaceae. Botanical Journal of the Linnean Society 161: 132–136.
Jessop, JP. 1979. Liliaceae. Flora Malesiana, Series 1 9: 189-235

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 19 October 2020

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 320 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 204. = Aloe barbadensis Mill. , Gard. Dict., 8th Ed. (1768) n.2 ; Naves, Novis. App. (1880) 266. ≠ Aloe humilis auct. non L. ; Blanco, Fl. Filip. (1837) 256; Fl. Filip. ed. 2 (1845) 179; Fl. Filip. ed. 3 (1877) 321.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 June 2026

species.citation: (L.) Redouté , Liliac. (Redouté) 1 (1802) t.1 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 203; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 207; ≡ Dracaena ensifolia L. , Mant. Pl. (1767) 63. = Dianella robusta Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1806. = Dianella nemorosa Lam. , Encycl. (Lamarck) 2 (1786) 276, nom. illeg. ; Tabl. Encycl. 2 (1792) 388, nom. illeg.; Hatusima, Mem. Fac. Agr. Kagoshima Univ. 5 (1966) 59. ≠ Dianella revoluta auct. non R.Br. ; Merr., EPFP 1 (1922) 203. ≠ Dianella caerulea auct. non Sims ; Merr., PJS 2 c (1907) 266; EPFP 1 (1922) 202.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, China, Himalayas, Indochina, Japan, Madagascar, Myanmar, New Zealand, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Taiwan, Thailand. BILIRAN, BUCAS GRANDE, CATANDUANES, CEBU, GUIMARAS, JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra (photos), Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines, Camarines Norte, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao Oriental, Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, POLILLO, SAMAR, TAMLANGON.
species.notes: The name Dianella nemorosa Lam. is a nom. illeg., because the genus was not validly described at the time the name was published. Throughout Malesia; open grasslands to forests. Fl. Jan-Dec. 0-2200(-3000)m.

species.citation: (Blume) Kunth , Enum. Pl. (Kunth) 5 (1850) 52 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 203; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 209; ≡ Rhuacophila javanica Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1827) 14.
species.distribution: New Caledonia, Pacific Ocean, Philippines. BATANES, CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Abra (photos), Albay, Apayao (photos), Benguet, Camarines, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Ilocos Sur, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, South Cotabato (photos), MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY.
species.notes: Throughout Malesia, open slopes, thickets, ravines, forest edges, exposed narrow ridge crests, edges of fumaroles and volcanic craters, streambanks, etc, locally common. Fl. Jan-Dec. (1000-)1450-3000m.
